name: @agiterra/wallet-claude-code
description: Wallet plugin for Claude Code — sign-decision tools (approve / refuse / reject_with_error) + vault management (wallet_list / wallet_use + operator-gated grant / revoke / set_access_mode). Reads + edits wallet directory via Wire's plugin_settings.
author: Tim Garthwaite <https://github.com/mividtim>
